name: Suite — Realistic Bilingual Analyst Questions (EN + AR)
description: One comprehensive bilingual suite shaped by how a HUMAN analyst actually asks — not how a synthetic test would phrase it. Covers: super-casual one-liners ("open ones?"), professional sentences ("Please provide a count of..."), typo'd shorthand ("hw many tkts r open"), parenthesised column lists ("users(name, email)"), vague follow-ups ("summary please"), code-mixed Arabic+English, and the obvious refusal cases (delete/write). The goal is the COVERAGE of phrasing styles a real user produces; ExpectedSql is only provided when the answer is unambiguous so execution accuracy stays meaningful. Vague / clarification cases set ExpectedIntent only — they test routing, not SQL.

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Please provide the total number of tickets in the system.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: how many users do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: count of all open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: hw many tkts r open
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me all categories
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketCategories

Scenarios.Question: users(name, email)
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: I'd like to see a list of all roles configured in the system.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM AspNetRoles

Scenarios.Question: give me the priorities
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketPriorities

Scenarios.Question: list of user( name ,id ,email )
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Id, UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets without a category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE CategoryId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: user names containing 'admin'
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers WHERE UserName LIKE '%admin%'

Scenarios.Question: users with their roles
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, r.Name AS RoleName FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id LEFT JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId

Scenarios.Question: users that have no tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: ticket counts by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS StatusName, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name

Scenarios.Question: top 5 categories by ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 c.Name AS CategoryName, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: latest 10 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: this month vs last month tickets
كم عدد التذاكر؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: هل يمكنك تقديم العدد الإجمالي للتذاكر في النظام؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: كم لدينا مستخدمين
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: عدد التذاكر المفتوحة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: كم تذكره مفتوحه
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: أعطني قائمة بالفئات
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketCategories

Scenarios.Question: مستخدمين (الاسم، البريد)
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: أرغب في رؤية قائمة بجميع الأدوار المعرّفة في النظام.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM AspNetRoles

Scenarios.Question: اعرض الأولويات
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketPriorities

Scenarios.Question: التذاكر المفتوحة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: تذاكر بدون فئة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE CategoryId IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: أسماء المستخدمين التي تحتوي على admin
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers WHERE UserName LIKE '%admin%'

Scenarios.Question: المستخدمون وأدوارهم
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, r.Name AS RoleName FROM AspNetUsers u LEFT JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id LEFT JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId

Scenarios.Question: المستخدمون الذين ليس لديهم تذاكر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: عدد التذاكر حسب الحالة
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS StatusName, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name

Scenarios.Question: أعلى 5 فئات حسب حجم التذاكر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 c.Name AS CategoryName, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: آخر 10 تذاكر
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: تذاكر هذا الشهر مقارنة بالشهر الماضي
